events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. The scenario — a group lockbox misused during LOTO — is a critical failure: it indicates the box is being controlled by a single (master/supervisor) lock rather than requiring each exposed worker to apply their own personal lock and tag directly to the hasp, which defeats the core protection OSHA 1910.147(f)(3) requires for group lockout procedures. I marked it `fail` / `critical` risk with corrective actions (individual locks for every exposed worker, removal of the master lock, re-verification of zero energy, and documented group procedure) before any work can resume.
